name: YEKO
short_description: Ever said, “Let me finish this hand, then I can die”? We did and took our gaming addiction to the afterlife. Yeko tells the absurd tale of skeletons who couldn’t get enough of Okey in life and now set up the table beyond the grave low on calcium, but never on competitive spirit.
detailed_description:
Forget traditional board games. Yeko is an original indie project that blends classic culture with absurd humor and physics-based mechanics where competition doesn’t end, not even in the grave. In the world of skeletons, the rules are flexible… just like our characters’ necks!

   New Rules at the Afterlife Table

     In Yeko, you must rely not only on luck, but also on your attention and speed. The core “Strategic Intervention”               system completely transforms traditional gameplay strategies.

  • Neck Extension: With a physics-based neck mechanism that can reach even the farthest corner of the table, you can spy on your opponents’ moves or interfere with tiles on the ground from a distance.

  • Stealing Mechanic: You can steal tiles not only from the table, but even directly from your opponents’ hands. Be careful, though dynamic head movements and shifting gaze angles mean you can be caught at any moment

  • Dynamic Animation System: Skeleton heads that move freely left, right, up, and down react comically to every move and every stolen tile, balancing the tension at the table with humor.

    Those Who Wait in the Dark

    The world of Yeko is not limited to the classic table. Deep within the grave, we continue working on new and mysterious game modes that will completely rewrite the rules of okey.

    Very soon, we’ll return with updates that will overturn the balance at the table and drag your skeletons to places they’ve never been before.

    For now, we can only say this: You haven’t seen anything yet.

      Key Features

  • Absurd Physics & Animations: Unique head and neck movements enhanced with hilarious animations.

  • Innovative Gameplay: To win, you’ll need more than just a good hand you’ll need a fast neck and professional-level stealing skills.

  • Voice Chat & Animated Jaws: Your skeleton’s jaw moves in real-time as you speak. It’s not just the tiles moving; the skeletons are talking back!

  • Independent Spirit: An indie game experience built with passion and humor by a two-person team.

Developer’s Note:
“We designed this game together with my spouse, wondering how we could make that sweet competition at the game table even more absurd. The ‘tile-stealing’ fights and laughter we experienced while testing it ourselves we’re now bringing them straight to your table. If our marriage survived the rivalry during this development process, your friendships might survive this table too!

…Well, we hope so.”

In Yeko, everyone who sits at the table is equal but the one with the longer neck is always one step ahead. Add it to your Wishlist now and take your place in this bony adventure!

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Latin America, Turkish, German

reviews.review_text: hayatımda daha kötü daha az oyun gördüm dümdüz iade

Literally cant play this game because no one hosting a game and when you host no one joins... this game is basically rummique...just buy the board game its more fun to play with family... this program is pathetic and the fact someone was foolish enough to waste time making it blows my mind...

3 saatlik youtube videosu izlesen daha iyisini yaparsın anlamış değilim assetler çok kötü oyunun optimizasyonu yok oynanış desen iğrenç kısacası emeği geçenler mümkünse bir daha emek sarfetmesin (ki oyunun halinden dolayı sarfettiklerini de düşünmüyorum)
